summary: Comprehensive ERP for Poland—finance, logistics, production, and HR for growing businesses, reflecting Unit4's regional portfolio for Central Europe.

data.headline: Teta ERP
data.subheadline: End-to-end ERP for Polish organizations scaling operations.

children.text: Teta ERP helps Polish companies unify finance, supply chain, manufacturing, and people processes on a single modern platform—so leaders can see performance clearly and respond to market and regulatory change with confidence.
